summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Location-based Matching feature. All 15 backend API tests pass. All frontend UI tests pass. Feature is fully functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/posts returns posts with is_nearby field (boolean)
GET /api/posts returns posts with user_location field
is_nearby=true for posts from users in same location (Austin matches Austin, TX)
is_nearby=false for posts from users in different locations (Denver vs Austin)
GET /api/posts?nearby_only=true filters to only nearby posts
nearby_only filter excludes distant location posts
GET /api/posts/matches returns posts with is_nearby, user_location, match_score fields
Matches endpoint prioritizes nearby users with +100 match_score bonus
Matches sorted by match_score (highest first)
GET /api/users/nearby returns users in same location
Nearby users list excludes current user
Users without location get appropriate message
Partial location matching works (Austin matches Austin, TX)
Case-insensitive location matching works
Empty location handling works correctly
Frontend: Nearby filter button present and functional
Frontend: Nearby badges (green) displayed on posts from same location
Frontend: User location displayed under username on posts
Frontend: Right panel shows 'Nearby Homesteaders' section
Frontend: User's location displayed in right panel
Frontend: Potential Matches section shows matches with Nearby badges
Frontend: Filter button toggles between active/inactive states
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection still failing on page load (pre-existing issue from iteration 1) - not related to location feature
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_location_matching.py - Created comprehensive test suite for location matching
seed_data_creation: Created 3 test users with different locations (2 in Austin, TX and 1 in Denver, CO) and 3 test posts for location matching verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location-based matching feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints GET /api/posts, GET /api/posts?nearby_only=true, GET /api/posts/matches, and GET /api/users/nearby all return correct location data. Frontend displays Nearby badges, user locations, and Nearby Homesteaders section correctly. Filter button toggles nearby-only view. Test users created with Austin, TX and Denver, CO locations for verification.

GET /api/posts.is_nearby_field: PASS - Boolean field present on all posts
GET /api/posts.user_location_field: PASS - String field present on all posts

GET /api/posts?nearby_only=true.filters_nearby_posts: PASS - Only returns posts with is_nearby=true

GET /api/posts/matches.match_score_field: PASS - Includes match_score with +100 bonus for nearby

GET /api/users/nearby.returns_same_location_users: PASS - Returns users matching current user's location
GET /api/users/nearby.excludes_current_user: PASS - Current user not in list

Frontend Nearby Filter.toggles_posts: PASS - Shows only nearby posts when active

Frontend Nearby Badge.badge_displayed: PASS - Green badge with MapPin icon on nearby posts

Frontend User Location.displayed_on_posts: PASS - Location shown under username with MapPin icon

Frontend Right Panel.nearby_homesteaders_section: PASS - Shows users in same location
